import io
import list
import string

fn tokenize(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut tokens: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut start = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(c)
      if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 13 or c == 10
        if start < i
          let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
        end
        start = i + 1
      else
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start < n
    let tok = string.substring(line, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  tokens
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if list.contains(b, v)
        if not list.contains(result, v)
          result = list.push(result, v)
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      mut j = 0
      mut inserted = false
      mut newr: List<Int> = []
      while j < result.len()
        match result.get(j)
        when Some(w)
          if not inserted
            if v < w
              newr = list.push(newr, v)
              inserted = true
            end
          end
          newr = list.push(newr, w)
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if not inserted
        newr = list.push(newr, v)
      end
      result = newr
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn render(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  out
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = tokenize(line1)
let b = tokenize(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  println(render(sorted))
end
